_meta.description: BakeSquad evaluation dataset v2 — extends v1 with query-specificity triples, preference-capture cases, multi-turn sequences, and scoring-transparency targets.

groups.short_query: 1–3 word queries; baseline extraction with minimal context
groups.long_query: Multi-sentence queries with full preference specification
groups.preference_rich: Queries with explicit constraints/preferences; tests extraction recall
groups.scoring_transparency: Queries targeting specific technique signals; run with --full-pipeline (Stage 2)

extra_fields.expected_constraint_keywords: Substrings that must appear in hard_constraints (case-insensitive). Tested in Stage 1B.
extra_fields.expected_preference_keywords: Substrings that must appear in soft_preferences (case-insensitive). Tested in Stage 1B.
extra_fields.expected_modifiers: Exact modifier tags expected in modifiers list. Tested in Stage 1B.
extra_fields.expected_flour_type: Exact flour_type string expected. Tested in Stage 1B.
extra_fields.expected_technique_signals: Technique signals parser should extract. Tested in Stage 2.
extra_fields.turns: Multi-turn conversation for Stage 1D. Each turn has role, content, optional expected_turn_type, expected_extract.

test_cases.query: cookies
test_cases.notes: Single-word: canonical cookie

test_cases.query: banana bread
test_cases.notes: Known-issue baseline — 2-word quick_bread

test_cases.query: birthday cake
test_cases.notes: 2-word cake

test_cases.query: muffins
test_cases.notes: Single-word quick_bread

test_cases.query: brownies
test_cases.notes: Single-word; brownies = bar cookie

test_cases.query: sourdough bread
test_cases.notes: Yeast bread = other

test_cases.query: chewy brown butter chocolate chip cookies
test_cases.notes: Cookie with technique qualifier

test_cases.query: moist banana bread that stays fresh all week
test_cases.notes: quick_bread with moisture preference

test_cases.query: layered chocolate birthday cake with ganache frosting
test_cases.notes: Cake with build detail

test_cases.query: bakery-style blueberry muffins with streusel topping
test_cases.notes: quick_bread with texture qualifier

test_cases.query: fudgy brownies with walnuts and sea salt
test_cases.notes: Bar cookie with addins

test_cases.query: classic sourdough with open crumb
test_cases.notes: Yeast bread with technique qualifier

test_cases.query: I want chocolate chip cookies that are chewy in the middle with crispy edges, made with browned butter that has been chilled overnight before baking, using both milk and dark chocolate chips for a richer flavour
test_cases.notes: Full-spec cookie: technique + texture + flavour preferences

test_cases.query: Looking for a banana bread recipe that stays moist for at least 3 to 4 days. I strongly prefer oil-based recipes over butter-based ones, want a good rise, and would love to fold in chocolate chips or chopped walnuts. Extra ripe bananas are a must.
test_cases.notes: Full-spec quick_bread: fat preference + moisture + addins

test_cases.query: I need a rich, very moist chocolate layer cake for a birthday party of about 20 people. It should have at least 3 layers with ganache filling and chocolate buttercream frosting. No nuts anywhere because of allergies. The cake needs to stay moist for 2 days since I am baking it the day before the party.
test_cases.notes: Full-spec cake: hard nut constraint + moisture + timing

test_cases.query: I want bakery-style blueberry muffins with huge domed tops and a crunchy brown sugar streusel. They should be moist inside but not gummy, and I want to use fresh blueberries not frozen. I prefer using buttermilk for extra tenderness and tanginess.
test_cases.notes: Full-spec quick_bread: texture + technique + ingredient preferences

test_cases.query: chocolate chip cookies without any nuts
test_cases.notes: Hard constraint: nut exclusion must be captured in hard_constraints

test_cases.query: moist banana bread that stays soft for at least 5 days
test_cases.notes: Moisture preference must be captured in soft_preferences

test_cases.query: gluten-free chocolate chip cookies using almond flour
test_cases.notes: Modifier + flour_type inference from explicit text

test_cases.query: vegan chocolate cake without any dairy products
test_cases.notes: Multiple modifiers: vegan + dairy_free must both be extracted

test_cases.query: oil-based banana bread only, no butter recipes
test_cases.notes: Fat-type preference must surface as a constraint

test_cases.query: completely nut-free birthday cake for a school party
test_cases.notes: Nut-free is a hard safety constraint in school contexts

test_cases.query: paleo banana bread with almond flour and no refined sugar
test_cases.notes: Dietary modifier + flour_type + sugar constraint

test_cases.query: super chewy brown butter cookies with flaky sea salt on top
test_cases.notes: Technique + texture preferences must be captured

test_cases.description: Filter by fat type, then ask a factual question

turns.content: why does oil make cookies stay softer longer than butter?

test_cases.description: Exclude ingredient then re-search with different intent

turns.content: actually I want chocolate banana bread instead

test_cases.description: Factual question mid-session, then narrow results

turns.content: what does the leavening ratio number mean for muffins?
find me a low-sugar version of these
actually find me a dairy-free version instead

test_cases.query: brown butter chocolate chip cookies chilled overnight before baking
test_cases.notes: Stage 2 only. Should trigger brown_butter+chill_dough synergy (+10 bonus). Expected composite boost from technique.

test_cases.query: moist banana bread using the fold method with rested batter
test_cases.notes: Stage 2 only. Should trigger fold_method+batter_rest synergy (+10 bonus).

test_cases.query: New York style cheesecake baked in a water bath at low temperature
test_cases.notes: Stage 2 only. Should trigger water_bath+bake_low synergy (+15 bonus). High technique score expected.

test_cases.query: red velvet cupcakes with cream cheese frosting using room temperature butter creamed properly
test_cases.notes: Stage 2 only. Should trigger cream_method+room_temp_butter synergy (+10 bonus).
